description: An operator must assess multiple inbound, unidentified aircraft to determine their threat level and recommend an appropriate response.

nodes.task_description: Fuse radar, IFF (Identify Friend or Foe), and intelligence data for all inbound tracks.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator correctly correlates data from multiple sources for each track.

nodes.task_description: Compare track behavior (speed, altitude, vector) against known adversary tactics and flight plans.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator correctly flags one track as anomalous and potentially hostile.

nodes.task_description: Prioritize the anomalous track and recommend scrambling interceptor aircraft for visual identification.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator makes a timely and correct recommendation in line with standard procedures.
